stale_context_findings.finding: Commit drift detected between original and resumed session.
stale_context_findings.operator_response: Regenerate or reapprove plan artifacts before privileged execution.

stale_context_findings.finding: Stored memory about tool permissions may conflict with current agent profile state.
stale_context_findings.operator_response: Trust current repository artifacts over stale memory and refresh repository facts.

previous_error_footprints.summary: Prior cloud-agent run stalled on workflow approval.
previous_error_footprints.risk: A resumed agent may treat the stalled work as complete or replay the old fix path without checking current workflow state.

previous_error_footprints.summary: Prior security-gate inspection failed due permission scope.
previous_error_footprints.risk: A resumed agent may keep chasing an old permission error after the workflow or branch changed.

blocking_findings: Commit SHA mismatch requires state review.
Approval state must be checked before privileged execution.
safe_next_action: Block privileged execution until continuity is verified against current branch, commit, memory, permissions, prior errors, and approval state.
